modules.sql: SELECT COALESCE(s.security_type, 'Unknown') AS security_type, COUNT(*) AS holding_count, ROUND(SUM(h.current_value), 2) AS total_value, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(h.current_value) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 2) ELSE 0 END AS avg_value, MAX(h.ifw_effective_date) AS ifw_effective_date FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN securities s ON h.security_id = s.security_id AND h.ifw_effective_date = s.ifw_effective_date GROUP BY COALESCE(s.security_type, 'Unknown') ORDER BY security_type
